theme_strategy.description: Pitch-black background with a dynamic canvas layer. Deep purple accents (#7B2CBF) act as structural lighting, while toxic neon green (#39FF14) and hot pink (#FF00FF) serve as high-contrast interactive highlights. The overall aesthetic mimics Noomo Labs - highly immersive, WebGL-driven feel, deep contrast, and neon emissions.

headings.usage: Use for massive hero intros, section titles, and high-impact numerical data. Use tracking-tighter for massive text.

body.usage: For readable paragraphs, contact form labels, and descriptive text.

mono.usage: For technical tags, GitHub repos, sub-labels, and decorative tech elements.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Ultra-minimalist. Background: `bg-white/[0.02]`. Backdrop Blur: `backdrop-blur-xl`. Border: `border border-white/10`. No muddy grays. Use optical clarity to let the dynamic canvas bleed through.
visual_enhancers.neon_bloom: For interactive highlights (like hovering a project card): `shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)]` or for pink: `shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,0,255,0.4)]`. Combine with a border color shift.
visual_enhancers.textures: Include a subtle noise/grain overlay spanning the entire viewport (`pointer-events-none mix-blend-overlay opacity-20`) to prevent digital flatness.

3d_and_motion.smooth_scroll: Lenis is MANDATORY. The portfolio must use Lenis for buttery smooth momentum scrolling to achieve the high-end agency feel.
3d_and_motion.dynamic_canvas: A fixed full-screen R3F canvas or framer-motion particle system in the background (`z-[-1]`), creating depth and subtle movement behind the glass panels.
3d_and_motion.hero_avatar: Top center interactive container. Use Framer Motion `useMotionValue`, `useSpring`, and `useTransform` to track the cursor and apply a 3D perspective tilt (`rotateX`, `rotateY`) to a DOM element OR use R3F to render an actual 3D Icosahedron/Torus that tracks the mouse.
3d_and_motion.horizontal_scroll: The 'My Projects' section must use Framer Motion's `useScroll` on a target container to map vertical scroll progress to horizontal translation of the project cards array.

layouts_and_grids.hero: Absolute/Fluid structure. 100vw/100vh viewport. The 3D avatar container is top-center. Text floats dynamically.
layouts_and_grids.about: Asymmetrical bento-style glassmorphism panels. Use `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12` with wide gaps (`gap-8`). Varying spans to create tension.
layouts_and_grids.projects: Sticky container taking up `h-[300vh]`. Inside, a horizontal track of massive project cards that glide laterally. Cards should be tall (`aspect-[3/4]` or similar).
layouts_and_grids.contact: Minimalist, centered glassmorphism card. Strict alignment. Floating labels or stark mono inputs.

component_instructions.audio_toggle: A fixed floating button (e.g., bottom-right). Styling: Minimalist icon (Lucide `Volume2` / `VolumeX`). Decorative disabled state or visual-only toggle (turns on/off background particle speed, since audio was skipped).
component_instructions.projects_card: On hover: Scale up slightly (`scale-105`), trigger vibrant neon color-shift (`border-primary`), and add emissive bloom drop shadow. Use Framer Motion for the layout transition.
component_instructions.contact_form: Use `react-hook-form` + `zod` for validation. Inputs must have `bg-transparent border-b border-white/20` focus: `border-primary focus:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.2)]`. No default HTML validation bubbles. Toast notifications via `sonner` for success/error.

projects.description: Abstract neon rings, use as Project 1 thumbnail
Red/Purple geometric abstraction, use as Project 2 thumbnail
Neon blue light in dark setting, use as Project 3 thumbnail
Glowing neon triangle, use as Project 4 thumbnail

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="audio-toggle"`, `data-testid="contact-submit"`).
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over the pitch-black and dynamic canvas maintains at least 4.5:1 contrast. Glass panels need enough opacity or backdrop-blur to keep text legible.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS.
2. Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Unbounded, Manrope, JetBrains Mono.
3. Install dependencies: framer-motion, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei (or three), lucide-react, lenis, sonner, react-hook-form, zod, @hookform/resolvers, clsx, tailwind-merge.
4. Apply the dark theme globally in index.css. Set body background to #0D0D11.
5. Implement a global smooth scroll wrapper using Lenis.
6. Build the dynamic canvas background: A fixed full-screen div rendering R3F particles or floating geometries.
7. Build the Hero: 100vh height. Include the 3D interactive avatar (Torus/Icosahedron) in a container that listens to mouse moves and tilts via framer-motion spring physics or R3F useFrame.
8. Build the Projects section: Implement horizontal scrolling using framer-motion's useScroll on a tall wrapper to map scroll-Y to translateX.
9. Add the floating audio toggle (visual only decorative).
10. NEVER use placehold.it or dummyimage.com. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for projects.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Push the envelope.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Never apply universal transitions like 'transition: all'. It breaks 3D transforms.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use generic emoji icons like 🤖🧠💭. Use Lucide icons.
